← Your Name

Hello, World

March 18, 2026

Why I built this

I wanted a simple place to share my links and writing without handing my content over to a third-party platform. So I built LinkSapling — a static site generator that outputs plain HTML you can host anywhere.

No tracking. No upsells. Just a config file and some markdown.

What it can do

  • Customizable colors, fonts, and layout via a single YAML file
  • Social links with icons
  • Blog posts written in Markdown (like this one)
  • Outputs plain HTML — host on GitHub Pages, Netlify, or anywhere

A code example

// This is what the build script does at its core
const html = template({ title, links, posts });
fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html', html);

What's next

More themes, an init command, and a dev server for live preview. Stay tuned.
